I I started playing this game back in December then I started playing too march then after march easter came out it was pretty fun now this game is just trash, the monsters use to be super fast the game use to be actually scary and fun sometimes and be the monster always carried because there was about 30-20 people every lobby now the only thing that’s keeping this game alive are people that are new to this game they destroyed this game. It use to so peak🫩

Love the chases that happen, it can be scary sometimes, just there’s always a few bugs that get me killed or on the opposing end of emotions, laughing my heart out. 

BUGS/GLITCHES| NUMBER 1: It sounds weird.. and it is weird. Humongous objects. Seriously. So you can buy stuff like flashlights and explosives that ONLY KILL PLAYERS- and with that stuff you have a holster you can put stuff in. Sounds good? Well. You have little ingame purchases and one of them is a size menu. It adjusts your size. I put a flashlight in my holster when I was 0.1%  size and for some reason when I went to full size my flashlight got 10X bigger than a player;CONCLUSION: when you get bigger everything attached to you gets bigger too.. so when I holstered my flashlight when I was small and became bigger, the flashlight became bigger too. 
NUMBER 2: no story on this one. Monsters can get you through walls. Why? Probably because the hitbox is too big.
NUMBER 3: You have a little screen after you die but for some reason you have no gravity and your hands can touch stuff. I really don’t know why this would happen!
Number 4￼: (NOT MAJOR ONE) on that little screen after you die,￼ there is a red vignette of blood on the edges of the screen, and when you get bigger, the vignette stays the same size, and it’s just a dot in your vision. 
That’s all I had to say. Hope the developer sees this and patches this stuff because this took so long to write.

The jumpscares are not so scary expect i love this game so much the textures are good the graphics are good and osts are good I like it and I love how the monsters chase you around and yeah expect i catched a racist player but I forgot their name but please ban them if you see them saying it

This game has good monster models and stuff, but if I’m being very honest this game is very mid at best.. at least it is now. Ever since the remake I’ve seen a ton of complaints about it. And yeah, I agree with them. I just don’t like it, but if you would add the OG map back with all the og monsters there that would be amazing. And the blackout update is absolute booty. You can’t even see anything, and why would you even buy a flashlight? You used to just have it. Fix yall game or something, please.

reviews.review_title: unrecognizable game (in a not good way)
reviews.review_description: The game has changed so much and now the game is so different then like early 2025 also the monsters ai is just so broken and weird right now and the fact you have to buy a portable flashlight instead of just click a button is so annoying.dear lethal ape redux devs,could you please bring back the kind of like old vibe and add back the old monsters ai and the old flash light and make the map have the dark halls again and make the game a bit reversed in time again.Thanks if your reading this.

i love the game very much, it’s really good imo. the only thing that i dislike about this game is the private server network. i have a friend that loves to play tg, but doesnt like public lobbies. once we found out about this game, we thought it was amazing. my opinion on the game never changed but his did once he found out about private servers being quite buggy. we went into a private but once he noticed that everything was glitched, he immediately didn’t want to play anymore.
